RewardMeaningText: The Standard Path turns Dungeon Alpha into a bigger mana_shard jump, but only if City A can stomach the thinner sustain line.
CityImpactMeaningText: Creates a larger mana_shard cushion, but the later shrine and lower recover leave the next dispatch less stable than the Rest Path.
RecommendationShiftText: City A can press the shard advantage after the Standard Path, but the next dispatch should account for the rougher recovery window.
